meaning: adj.纯洁的,无瑕疵的,不锈的
examples: It's possible to weld stainless steel to ordinary steel.
The standard spec includes stainless steel holding tanks.
The stainless steel pipework has been constructed, tested, and inspected to very high standards.
Most importantly, it is the company's first refrigerator constructed of stainless steel inside and out.
It will, at least, be far more scratch-resistant than the previous mirrored, stainless steel backs.
